examples: The subject matter was so technical as to be beyond the ken of the average layman.
Where the law is concerned, I am only a layman.
I'm a layman. What I'm going to say may expose myself to ridicule, yet I still want to say a few words.
As with any complex law, however, the text gets the layman only so far.
The art of telling beautiful science in layman's terms just might save the world.
